_comment_1: Slither configuration for Noethrion smart contracts. The exclusions below are deliberate and each has a rationale documented in docs/audit/smart-contracts-audit.md (Static analysis section). An auditor reading this file alongside the audit doc sees that we did not over-exclude.
_comment_2: Detector exclusions: timestamp is used only to gate the challenge-window comparison, not for randomness, and validator-manipulable jitter (~15s) is acceptable under our 1-hour default window. solc-version is a standard exclusion in pinned-pragma projects. unindexed-event-address is included defensively: every address event parameter in NoethrionAttester / NoethrionToken is ALREADY indexed (proposer, validator, beneficiary, minter, oldToken, newToken, leaf), so the exclusion is a no-op against today's source — it stays as a guard against future events being introduced without the indexed keyword on address params.
